prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T5 work setting, the evaluated element is S-102 Structural bolting within 2.4 Structural & Ironwork. The relevant subcategory is 2.4.1 Steel Erection. The observed field condition is: DTI squirter washers not fully crushed. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors RCSC Specification.
title: T5 S-102 Code/spec compliance
